name: IRC_TN_JA_REQUEST_MORE_INFO
description: This is the table for storing Request More information details of a Job Application on Talent Network.

columns.Name: JA_APP_MORE_INFO_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: JOB_APP_ID
columns.Comments: To store the Job Application Id. Foreign Key to IRC_TN_JOB_APPLICATIONS.

columns.Name: SUBSCRIBER_ID
columns.Comments: To store the subscriber id. Foreign Key to IRC_TN_SUBSCRIBERS.

columns.Name: AGENCY_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the AGENCY_ID of the Agent who submitted the candidate job application. Foreign key to IRC_AGENCIES table.

columns.Name: AGENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the AGENT_ID of the Agent who submitted the candidate job application. Foreign key to IRC_AGENTS table.

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Talent Network Request More Info Status as a lookup code. Lookup type is ORA_IRC_PADC_STATUS.

columns.Name: RMI_IDENTIFIER_GUID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier for deep links.

columns.Name: RMI_REQUESTED_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date when the RMI is created on Talent Network.

columns.Name: RMI_SUBMITTED_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date when the RMI is Submitted/Responded by the agent on Talent Network.

columns.Name: FA_SECONDARY_FLOW_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Secondary Flow Id from FA. Derived from IRC_JA_SECONDARY_FLOWS.SECONDARY_FLOW_ID.

columns.Name: FA_STEP_ACTION_USAGE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Step Action Usage Id from FA. Derived from IRC_JA_SECONDARY_FLOWS.STEP_ACTION_USAGE_ID.

columns.Name: FA_APPLY_FLOW_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Apply Flow Id from FA. Derived from IRC_APPLY_FLOWS.APPLY_FLOW_ID.

columns.Name: FA_APPLY_FLOW_VERSION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Apply Flow Version Id from FA. Derived from IRC_JA_SECONDARY_FLOWS.AF_VERSION_ID.

columns.Name: FA_SEC_FLOW_TRIGGER_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date when the RMI is triggered on FA. Derived from IRC_JA_SECONDARY_FLOWS.SEC_FLOW_TRIGGER_DATE.

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicates the status of the object.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_NAME
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_PACKAGE
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the package name of the job that created or last updated the row.
